title: Persist subagent reports

tasks.title: Add strict sub-agent report schemas and task model fields
tasks.verification: Implemented strict sub-agent report schemas and task/signal model fields. Verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts src/types/task-output.test.ts` (21 tests), `pnpm run typecheck` (exit 0).

tasks.title: Persist reports through a signal-only workflow reducer
tasks.verification: Implemented signal-only workflow persistence for sub-agent reports: signal/message contract, reducer append/dedupe, blocker-to-error_recovery mapping, continue-as-new seed preservation. Verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/types/subagent-reports.test.ts src/temporal/messages.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.test.ts` (29 tests), `pnpm run typecheck`, and Prettier check for touched files.

tasks.title: Implement adv_subagent_report_submit tool with dry-run and consumers
tasks.verification: AC8 acceptance blocker remediated. Added durable task error_recovery recording for malformed report payloads and Temporal submit-signal failures, with regression coverage. Verification passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/subagent-report.test.ts src/temporal/workflows.signal-handlers.test.ts src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts; pnpm run check; pnpm test; pnpm run build.

tasks.title: Expose persisted reports in adv_change_show and preserve legacy extraction
tasks.verification: GREEN: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts src/tools/checkpoint.test.ts passed (59 tests). Related legacy extraction/read-surface suite passed: pnpm exec vitest run src/tools/change.test.ts src/tools/checkpoint.test.ts src/tools/task.test.ts src/utils/extract-structured-output.test.ts src/types/task-output.test.ts (121 tests). Quality: pnpm run check passed.

tasks.title: Update sub-agent and command contracts for tool-call report submission
tasks.verification: Updated adv-engineer/adv-reviewer and apply/review/harden contracts for ATTEMPT and adv_subagent_report_submit transport. Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts passed (99 tests); pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts src/delegation-matrix.test.ts src/commands-spine-assets.test.ts src/adv-skill-backed-commands-assets.test.ts passed (176 tests); pnpm run check passed.

tasks.title: Add subagent-reports spec law and strengthen delegation-defaults
tasks.verification: Added .adv/specs/subagent-reports/spec.json with conformance_required:false and strengthened delegation-defaults rq-delDefaults05 for typed persisted reports. Verification: pnpm exec vitest run src/subagent-reports-spec-assets.test.ts src/delegation-matrix.test.ts src/__tests__/spec-citation-invariant.test.ts passed (25 tests); pnpm run check passed.

tasks.title: Run full regression and quality gate sweep
tasks.verification: Full regression and quality gate sweep passed. Commands: pnpm test (exit 0); pnpm run check (exit 0); pnpm run build (exit 0). Working tree clean after build.

proposal.approval_evidence: Phase 1 problem statement confirmed by user (reply: "continue"). Phase 2 full proposal artifact created with 6 Success Criteria, 8/8/8 Scope sections (In/Out/Must Not), 8-item Discovery Agenda. B/F/S scan clean. User approved final proposal via inline Tier A (reply: "continue"). Proceeding inline to discovery.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery agreement persisted and contract already minted. agreement.md Sign-Off records user approval via inline Tier A reply ("approve") at Phase 4.5.1 on 2026-05-23; contract contains 39 approved items.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Independent adv-researcher validator returned CAUTION: dryRun path missing. Design updated to require adv_subagent_report_submit dryRun:true same-shape preview and persisted-state dedupe; no unresolved CONFLICT, no user-value tradeoff, no contract-compromise risk.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep vision via Tier A reply: "approve". Task graph contains 7 contract-linked tasks with TDD intent and dependencies; validation passed with warning only NO_DELTAS.

execution.approval_evidence: All 7 planned tasks completed. Checkpoints recorded commits through 6e9604e55b94efa33c237aad0247e20a138e48bc. Full verification passed: pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build. Working tree clean.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User approved acceptance via Tier A reply: "approve". AC8 blocker remediated and checkpointed at 443000fe537978b0e5491ec0898189119412cfb4. Independent adv-reviewer returned READY/PASS with no findings. Review matrix persisted with 39/39 passing or respected rows. Verification passed: focused subagent-report/workflow/boundary tests; pnpm run check; pnpm test; pnpm run build. Worktree clean. Remaining Temporal-unavailable failure-record fallback explicitly out of scope.

items.text: **AC1.** New MCP tool `adv_subagent_report_submit` accepts a Zod-strict typed payload with discriminated union on `agent` (`'adv-engineer' | 'adv-reviewer'` fully typed; `'adv-researcher' | 'adv-tron'` reserved literals for future extension); rejects malformed input with a typed error response.

**AC2.** Successful submission persists to store via new `subagentReportSubmittedSignal` (signal-only per `rq-changeWorkflowSignalOnly01`); cache refreshed via `fireSignalAndRefresh`; cross-project via target store helper per `rq-crossProjectTaskMutation01`.

**AC3.** Idempotency: replayed submissions with the same `(change_id, task_id, agent, attempt)` key are deduplicated in-handler via `seenReportIds`; `attempt` is **orchestrator-supplied** via spawn-prompt Context Packet (sparse keying allowed).
**AC4.** `adv_change_show include.subagentReports` returns persisted reports for the change. Reports stored as `task.subagent_reports[]` on `TaskSchema`.
**AC5.** Three Layer-3 field consumers wired with passing tests:
`follow_ups[]` → `adv_agenda_add` (category=`subagent-followup`, source=`(change_id, task_id, agent)`)
`blockers[]` → task `error_recovery` (each blocker recorded with file/line/diagnosis)
`verification[]` → cross-check vs `adv_run_test` records (warning surfaced when commands/exit-codes mismatch)
**AC6.** Asset tests mechanically parse the markdown example JSON from `adv-engineer.md` and `adv-reviewer.md` through the Zod schema; schema-markdown drift fails the test.
**AC7.** Regression test: simulated `MessageAbortedError` after `adv_subagent_report_submit` succeeds leaves the report persisted in store and queryable via `adv_change_show include.subagentReports`.

**AC8.** Submission failure semantics: sub-agent retries 3 times with exponential backoff on tool-call failure (Zod rejection, Temporal signal failure, network); on total failure, task `error_recovery` records the classified failure visible via `adv_change_show`. Regression tests cover Zod-rejection path and Temporal-failure path.
**AC9.** **Hard cut applied:**
Fenced-JSON sentinel emission instructions REMOVED from `.opencode/agents/adv-engineer.md` and `.opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md` (replaced by tool-call exit protocol)
Host-side `extractStructuredOutput` in `task.ts:738-761` and `checkpoint.ts:381-394` short-circuits when `task.subagent_reports[]` for the matching `(task_id, agent)` is non-empty
Existing `task.structured_output` write path remains functional for non-ADV callers and legacy data — no removal in this change
**AC10.** Context Packet specs updated to include `ATTEMPT: N` line:
`.opencode/command/adv-apply.md` § Apply Context Packet
`.opencode/command/adv-review.md` and `.opencode/command/adv-harden.md` equivalents
`.opencode/agents/adv-engineer.md` and `.opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md` document how to read and pass `ATTEMPT` through to the tool call
Asset tests pin the packet contract (`ATTEMPT:` anchor required)

**AC11.** `delegation-defaults rq-delDefaults05` strengthened to require typed + persisted + ingest-validated reports; new `subagent-reports` capability spec added with `conformance_required: false` for v1.

**AC12.** Forward-compat: discriminator union type literal includes `'adv-researcher' | 'adv-tron'` slots even though their schemas are not populated in this change — prevents breaking schema migration later.
**AC13.** Full quality gates green: `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`; `plugin/src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts` green; `plugin/src/temporal/workflows.test.ts` green.

**AC14.** No regression: existing `TaskStructuredOutputSchema` / `extractStructuredOutput` infrastructure continues to function for cases where it still fires (non-ADV callers; legacy task data). Existing tests in `extract-structured-output.test.ts`, `task-output.test.ts` remain green.
**C1.** Signal only — no `defineUpdate` on the change-workflow surface (`rq-changeWorkflowSignalOnly01`).
**C2.** Cache refresh via `fireSignalAndRefresh` (`rq-cacheRefresh01`); no direct `fireSignal(handle, ...)`.
**C3.** Cross-project mutation through target store helper (`rq-crossProjectTaskMutation01`).
**C4.** Workflow-bundle boundary preserved — new types in `plugin/src/types/` must remain workflow-safe (no `storage/`, `tools/`, `node:*` imports reachable from `temporal/workflows.ts`).
**C5.** Schema strictness: `.strict()` at the tool boundary (P33). Existing `TaskStructuredOutputSchema.passthrough()` left unchanged.
**C6.** Tool boundary: new tool fits `adv-engineer` / `adv-reviewer` bounded-emit category (sibling of `adv_run_test`, `adv_wisdom_add`); no other mutators added to their allowlists.
**C7.** Replay determinism: no date/random in workflow code beyond patched APIs. New signal handler follows established `signalMutation` pattern in `workflows.ts:669-678`.
**OOS1.** A2A or external inter-agent wire protocol
**OOS2.** Streaming progress / partial-report emission during sub-agent work
**OOS3.** Modifying OpenCode host semantics (`Task` tool, sub-agent spawn primitives)
**OOS4.** Typed schemas for `adv-researcher` and `adv-tron` reports (slots reserved per AC12)
**OOS5.** Removing existing `TaskStructuredOutputSchema` / `extractStructuredOutput` infrastructure
**OOS6.** Archive flow rendering of sub-agent reports (`ARCHIVE_SUMMARY.md` / `CONTRACT_TRACEABILITY.md`)
**OOS7.** Schema-breaking changes (`schema_version` stays `1.0` semantics)
**OOS8.** Cross-vendor agent interop

rows.evidence: Typed Zod schemas and adv_subagent_report_submit validation implemented; subagent-report tests and full pnpm test passed.
rows.notes: Sub-agent reports are strict, typed, durable state.

rows.evidence: adv_change_show include.subagentReports implemented; legacy prose parsing short-circuits when persisted reports exist; change/checkpoint/task tests passed.
follow_ups, blockers, and verification consumers covered in subagent-report tests; full pnpm test passed.
Agent asset tests parse markdown payload examples through Zod; ATTEMPT anchors pinned; relevant asset suites passed.
.adv/specs/delegation-defaults/spec.json strengthened; .adv/specs/subagent-reports/spec.json added; spec asset tests passed.
adv_subagent_report_submit accepts strict supported payloads and rejects malformed/unsupported payloads in subagent-report tests.
subagentReportSubmittedSignal persistence path uses fireSignalAndRefresh; target_path handled through withTargetPathStore; tests passed.
seenReportIds and subagentReportKey dedupe repeated submissions; ATTEMPT packet added; tests passed.
adv_change_show include.subagentReports returns persisted reports; reports stored on task.subagent_reports; change tests passed.
follow_ups to agenda, blockers to task error_recovery, verification warnings covered by subagent-report tests.
adv-engineer and adv-reviewer asset tests parse examples through Zod and pin ATTEMPT anchors.
workflow signal-handlers tests cover persisted report after message-loss scenario; focused and full tests passed.
AC8 remediation commit 443000fe adds durable task error_recovery on invalid payload and submit-signal failure; tests for both paths pass; adv-reviewer PASS/READY.
Fenced sentinel instructions removed from adv-engineer.md and adv-reviewer.md; checkpoint/task legacy extraction short-circuits when subagent_reports exist.
rows.notes: Hard cut applied while preserving legacy path.

rows.evidence: adv-apply, adv-review, adv-harden, adv-engineer, and adv-reviewer contracts include ATTEMPT: N; asset tests passed.
subagent-reports spec added with conformance_required:false; delegation-defaults rq-delDefaults05 strengthened; spec tests passed.
SubagentAgentSchema includes reserved adv-researcher and adv-tron literals while submit tool rejects unsupported variants for v1.
pnpm test, pnpm run check, pnpm run build, workflow-bundle tests passed after remediation.
Existing TaskStructuredOutputSchema / extractStructuredOutput tests remain green in full suite and related targeted suites.
Implementation and docs use tool-call report transport only for ADV sub-agent reports.
ATTEMPT supplied by context packet and persisted in report identity key.
AC8 remediation records total failure visibly through task error_recovery after tool retries fail; tests cover malformed and Temporal failure paths.
rows.notes: Retry/failure decision satisfied at durable record boundary.

rows.evidence: Layer-3 consumers implemented and tested in subagent-report suite.
No archive rendering added; reports exposed through change/task state only.
No defineUpdate introduced; workflow mutation uses signals.
Tool uses fireSignalAndRefresh for report and task update signals.
target_path execution routes through withTargetPathStore and target store.
plugin/src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts passed.
Strict Zod boundary for new report tool; legacy structured output tests remain green.
Submit tool supports adv-engineer/adv-reviewer payloads and rejects reserved unsupported agents for v1.
rows.notes: Tool bounded to supported report submission.

rows.evidence: Reducer dedupe and signal-handler tests passed; no nondeterministic external imports in workflow bundle.
No A2A or external protocol implementation added.
No streaming partial report implementation added.
No OpenCode host changes required or added.
adv-researcher and adv-tron remain reserved literals without full schemas.
Archive rendering was not added.
Legacy structured-output infrastructure remains, with only short-circuit when persisted reports exist.
No hybrid sentinel+tool emission retained for ADV sub-agent report contracts.
No unrelated agent/command transport expansion added beyond scoped ADV report contracts.

acceptanceCriteria: **AC1.** New MCP tool `adv_subagent_report_submit` accepts a Zod-strict typed payload with discriminated union on `agent` (`'adv-engineer' | 'adv-reviewer'` fully typed; `'adv-researcher' | 'adv-tron'` reserved literals for future extension); rejects malformed input with a typed error response.

**AC2.** Successful submission persists to store via new `subagentReportSubmittedSignal` (signal-only per `rq-changeWorkflowSignalOnly01`); cache refreshed via `fireSignalAndRefresh`; cross-project via target store helper per `rq-crossProjectTaskMutation01`.

**AC3.** Idempotency: replayed submissions with the same `(change_id, task_id, agent, attempt)` key are deduplicated in-handler via `seenReportIds`; `attempt` is **orchestrator-supplied** via spawn-prompt Context Packet (sparse keying allowed).
**AC4.** `adv_change_show include.subagentReports` returns persisted reports for the change. Reports stored as `task.subagent_reports[]` on `TaskSchema`.
**AC5.** Three Layer-3 field consumers wired with passing tests:
`follow_ups[]` → `adv_agenda_add` (category=`subagent-followup`, source=`(change_id, task_id, agent)`)
`blockers[]` → task `error_recovery` (each blocker recorded with file/line/diagnosis)
`verification[]` → cross-check vs `adv_run_test` records (warning surfaced when commands/exit-codes mismatch)
**AC6.** Asset tests mechanically parse the markdown example JSON from `adv-engineer.md` and `adv-reviewer.md` through the Zod schema; schema-markdown drift fails the test.
**AC7.** Regression test: simulated `MessageAbortedError` after `adv_subagent_report_submit` succeeds leaves the report persisted in store and queryable via `adv_change_show include.subagentReports`.

**AC8.** Submission failure semantics: sub-agent retries 3 times with exponential backoff on tool-call failure (Zod rejection, Temporal signal failure, network); on total failure, task `error_recovery` records the classified failure visible via `adv_change_show`. Regression tests cover Zod-rejection path and Temporal-failure path.
**AC9.** **Hard cut applied:**
Fenced-JSON sentinel emission instructions REMOVED from `.opencode/agents/adv-engineer.md` and `.opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md` (replaced by tool-call exit protocol)
Host-side `extractStructuredOutput` in `task.ts:738-761` and `checkpoint.ts:381-394` short-circuits when `task.subagent_reports[]` for the matching `(task_id, agent)` is non-empty
Existing `task.structured_output` write path remains functional for non-ADV callers and legacy data — no removal in this change
**AC10.** Context Packet specs updated to include `ATTEMPT: N` line:
`.opencode/command/adv-apply.md` § Apply Context Packet
`.opencode/command/adv-review.md` and `.opencode/command/adv-harden.md` equivalents
`.opencode/agents/adv-engineer.md` and `.opencode/agents/adv-reviewer.md` document how to read and pass `ATTEMPT` through to the tool call
Asset tests pin the packet contract (`ATTEMPT:` anchor required)

**AC11.** `delegation-defaults rq-delDefaults05` strengthened to require typed + persisted + ingest-validated reports; new `subagent-reports` capability spec added with `conformance_required: false` for v1.

**AC12.** Forward-compat: discriminator union type literal includes `'adv-researcher' | 'adv-tron'` slots even though their schemas are not populated in this change — prevents breaking schema migration later.
**AC13.** Full quality gates green: `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`; `plugin/src/temporal/workflow-bundle-boundary.test.ts` green; `plugin/src/temporal/workflows.test.ts` green.

**AC14.** No regression: existing `TaskStructuredOutputSchema` / `extractStructuredOutput` infrastructure continues to function for cases where it still fires (non-ADV callers; legacy task data). Existing tests in `extract-structured-output.test.ts`, `task-output.test.ts` remain green.
